text:
Created attachment 231019
Update to version 3.11.11

Update to version 3.11.11.
Python3 support for CQLSH COPY.

SVN patch attached.

svn rm files/patch-doc_source___templates_indexcontent.html
svn rm files/patch-doc_source___util_cql.py
svn add files/patch-.build_build-resolver.xml
svn add files/patch-pylib_requirements.txt

Updated maven repo must be manually copied to distfiles for patch testing and uploaded to LOCAL as part of the commit process. It is available at the following link:
https://drive.google.com/file/d/1JywrEUXG6srFm2S44BzCYRcpefyYufHt
